prompt: create a barchart visualizing the confusion matrix of iris flower dataset prediction results from xgboost model
prompt_refined: A grouped bar chart displaying the confusion matrix of prediction results for the Iris flower dataset from an XGBoost model. The chart's X-axis groups should represent the actual classes: Setosa, Versicolor, and Virginica. Within each X-axis group, there should be three distinct bars, each representing a predicted class (Setosa, Versicolor, Virginica) and its height corresponding to the count of samples. The Y-axis should be labeled 'Count'. The chart must have the title: 'Confusion Matrix of Iris Flower Dataset Prediction Results from XGBoost Model'. All labels and text should be clear and readable.
objects: Chart title: 'Confusion Matrix of Iris Flower Dataset Prediction Results from XGBoost Model'
X-axis group labels: Setosa, Versicolor, Virginica
Multiple bars arranged in groups, representing counts
Legend or color coding for predicted classes: Setosa, Versicolor, Virginica
Text labels for all visual components
